---
title: "STA 9750 – Kiran Rao Narsipur"
---

## About Me

I am an analytics and data engineering professional focused on building scalable, finance-grade data systems for **private equity and private credit organizations**. My work centers on translating complex financial and operational data into **accurate, auditable, executive-ready metrics** used for investment oversight, forecasting, and strategic decision-making.

I will soon start a job at **HPS / BlackRock** in a data engineering focused role supporting investment and finance stakeholders. My long-term goal is to operate at the intersection of **data engineering, financial analytics, and investment strategy**, combining rigorous technical systems with deep financial domain expertise.

I am currently pursuing a **Master of Science in Business Analytics at Baruch College (CUNY)** and plan to further strengthen my profile by completing the **CFA Program** alongside **AWS Data Engineering certifications**, with the objective of bridging institutional finance and modern data platforms.

This site hosts coursework and analytical projects completed for **STA 9750: Special Topics in Statistical Analysis**.

---

## Professional Summary

Analytics professional with experience designing and automating financial reporting, ARR analytics, and data pipelines for **$100M+ SaaS portfolios** backed by private equity sponsors. Proven ability to connect **data warehousing, BI, and Python automation** to business strategy, delivering trusted metrics for CFOs, finance teams, and investment partners.

---

## Core Competencies

- Financial analytics & KPI design (ARR, GRR, NRR, retention, forecasting)
- Data modeling and warehouse design for finance use cases
- Executive and board-level reporting
- Analytics engineering and automation
- Cross-functional stakeholder partnership

---

## Technical Skills

**Analytics & BI**  
Power BI, DAX, Power Query, Excel, SQL, LINQ, Codex

**Programming & Data Processing**  
Python (NumPy, Pandas, Requests, Scikit-learn), R

**Data Platforms & Cloud**  
Snowflake, BigQuery, dbt, GitHub

---

## Professional Experience

### Senior Financial Data Analyst  
**WebPT – Healthcare SaaS** | New York, NY  
*August 2024 – November 2025*

- Supported FP&A by building automated reporting and data products used for **private equity oversight and portfolio monitoring** by Warburg Pincus.  
- Partnered directly with the CFO and finance leadership on strategic reporting, improving forecast visibility across a **$100M+ ARR SaaS portfolio**.  
- Led the management and evolution of the Finance Power BI environment, reducing monthly reporting turnaround time by **70%**.  
- Designed and implemented Snowflake-based pipelines for **ARR, GRR, NRR, loss retention, logo retention**, and cohort-based analysis across product lines.  
- Built version-controlled ARR Bridge and Phantom Churn logic, uncovering **17% previously undetected churn** and improving period-over-period reconciliation.  
- Collaborated with Finance, Product, and Customer Success to integrate revenue and usage data for EMR and RCM product performance insights.

---

### Data Analyst – Business Intelligence  
**CyberMaxx – Cybersecurity MDR** | New York, NY  
*June 2019 – August 2024*

- Delivered recurring financial and operational reporting supporting **private equity oversight** of company growth and performance.  
- Reported to the SVP of Finance and led cross-functional sessions with senior finance and technical stakeholders to align on metric definitions and data quality.  
- Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL pipelines using Python to support analytics, forecasting, and operational dashboards.  
- Built and managed enterprise Power BI reporting across ARR, sales forecasting, pipeline analysis, product performance, and customer segmentation.  
- Centralized and automated client reporting, reducing delivery time by **80%** and improving consistency across customer-facing analytics.

---

## Education

**City University of New York (CUNY) – Baruch College**  
Master of Science in Business Analytics  
*Expected Graduation: December 2026*

**State University of New York (SUNY) College at Oneonta**  
Bachelor of Science in Business Economics (Finance)  
Honors: Dean’s List, Chi Alpha Sigma Academic Honor Society  
Varsity Tennis – Team Captain

---

```{r}
#| include: false
1 + 1
